howItWorks.intro: This vertical jump calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Vertical Jump
rules.explanation: The difference between your highest jump touch and your standing reach.

rules.name: Peak Power (Sayers)
rules.explanation: The Sayers equation estimates peak anaerobic power from vertical jump height and body mass.

howItWorks.outro: Individual results vary based on metabolism, genetics, and activity level. Consult your doctor before starting any program.

faq.q: What is a good vertical jump?
faq.a: For adult males, 20-24 inches is above average, 24-28 is very good, and 28+ is excellent (elite athletes). For females, 16-20 inches is above average and 24+ is excellent. NBA players average around 28-34 inches.

faq.q: How can I increase my vertical jump?
faq.a: Focus on plyometrics (box jumps, depth jumps), heavy squats, and Bulgarian split squats. Most people can add 4-8 inches over 8-12 weeks of dedicated training. Losing excess body weight also directly improves jump height.
